case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS MENDEZ, MARVIN ALEXANDER AKA MORENO, MARVIN A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, MARVIN ALEXANDER AKA MORENO, MARVIN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, MARVIN ALEXANDER AKA MORENO, MARVIN A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, MARVIN ALEXANDER AKA MORENO, MARVIN A. $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,131.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $9.17 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, MARVIN ALEXANDER AKA MORENO, MARVIN A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, MARVIN ALEXANDER AKA MORENO, MARVIN A.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, MARVIN ALEXANDER AKA MORENO, MARVIN A.
